goal: First, add the following recipes into the Broccoli app: 1) 'Pancakes' - 'Mix flour, eggs, milk. Cook on griddle'. 2) 'French Toast' - 'Dip bread in egg mixture, fry until golden'. 3) 'Omelette' - 'Beat eggs, pour in pan, add fillings'. 4) 'Waffles' - 'Pour batter into waffle iron'. 5) 'Scrambled Eggs' - 'Whisk eggs, cook on low heat with butter'. Then, delete the following recipes from Broccoli app: 'Pancakes', 'Omelette', 'Waffles'.

setup_recipes.title: Pancakes
setup_recipes.description: Mix flour, eggs, milk. Cook on griddle

setup_recipes.title: French Toast
setup_recipes.description: Dip bread in egg mixture, fry until golden

setup_recipes.title: Omelette
setup_recipes.description: Beat eggs, pour in pan, add fillings

setup_recipes.title: Scrambled Eggs
setup_recipes.description: Whisk eggs, cook on low heat with butter
